extraction.one_line_summary: BENNETT Sam won Stage 3 via Danny Van Poppel's leadout with 200m to go, capitalizing on patience after a hard right corner 800m from finish.
tactical_patterns: Van Poppel's leadout power to 200m proved decisive; Bennett waited through final corner while others panicked early.
Merlier's Soudal team controlled pace but had zero leadout at critical moment, shaking heads post-race.
Ackermann's long-distance sprint from far out failed; corner with 800m neutralized pure power sprinters without positioning.

rider_signals.BENNETT Sam: positive: Back-to-back wins confirm return to form, demonstrated tactical patience through technical finish.
rider_signals.MERLIER Tim: negative: Missing from final sprint two consecutive days despite team controlling race; leadout disintegration issue.
rider_signals.PETTERSON Mads: positive: Second place two consecutive days shows consistency but lacks final 50m acceleration against Bennett.
rider_signals.VAN POPPEL Danny: positive: Elite leadout man holding pace to 200m separates top sprinters from rest.
rider_signals.AFFINI Edoardo: neutral: Track specialist's TTT power earned red jersey but acknowledged mountains will cost him quickly.
